violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 2-door low boy unit. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2026

The 1-door low boy was observed held at an ambient temperature of 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food items within the unit were assessed and moved to other refrigeration during the time of inspection. Establishment is not to store TCS food items within the unit until an ambient temperature of 41 degrees Fahrenheit or lower is maintained. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025

Bagels available for self-service are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Establishment is to provide a common name for each product and list of ingredients for consumer view including allergens. New Violation. Correct By: 02/10/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on both prep units. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2025

The individual and prep unit cutting boards behind the counter and in the prep room are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2025
